name: EdwDmProvDirDmProvTypCatXrefExtr

sqlReaderQuery.value: WITH cte AS ( SELECT PROV_TYP_CD, PROV_CAT_CD, 1 AS SEQ_NO, WEB_SRCH_IN, USER_ID, CASE WHEN LTRIM(RTRIM(LAST_UPDT_DT_SK)) IN ('UNK','NA','') THEN CAST('1753-01-01' AS DATETIME) ELSE CAST(LAST_UPDT_DT_SK AS DATETIME) END AS LAST_UPDT_DT FROM @{pipeline().globalParameters.gbl_param_EDWOwner}.PROV_TYP_PROV_CAT_XREF_D WHERE PROV_TYP_PROV_CAT_XREF_SK NOT IN (0,1) ) SELECT PROV_TYP_CD, PROV_CAT_CD, SEQ_NO, WEB_SRCH_IN, USER_ID, LAST_UPDT_DT FROM cte
